{{Item
| image = Snorkel.png
| id = snorkel
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Non-dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Snorkel''' is a non-dyeable equipable item that makes your dog look ready to go blub blub.
[[File:Snorkel_display.png|none|thumb|600x600px|You don't need that! You can swim, remember?]]

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Glass Pane <br>+ Bamboo<br>+ Iron Ingot
+ [[Training Treat]]
| [[File:Snorkel_crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}
== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.17.0.
